title: blastus borneensis var. stellulatus
intro: Blastus borneensis var. stellulatus, also known as the Stellate Blastus, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, as well as acting as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Blastus borneensis var. stellulatus is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
